use_cases: AI chatbot interfaces requiring support for text and file attachments in a single input
Developer tools and IDEs needing conversational input with code or image sharing
SaaS products embedding AI assistants that accept multimodal inputs
Content creation platforms requiring rich chat input with attachment previews
Any messaging interface that needs animated, accessible file upload capabilities
ai_summary: A sophisticated multimodal chat input component that combines text input with file attachment support, featuring animated attachment previews, multiple button variants, and smooth Framer Motion transitions. Designed for AI-powered applications requiring rich conversational input with support for various content types including images and documents.
